title: #AIS: The Lanby's Tandice Urban on solving healthcare's customer service problem
description:
This talk was recorded LIVE at the All-In Summit in Miami and included slides. To watch on YouTube, check out our All-In Summit playlist: https://bit.ly/aisytplaylist

0:00 The Lanby's Tandice Urban breaks down why healthcare has a customer service problem, and how to fix it

12:28 Bestie Q&A: changing American's perspective on healthcare, opportunity for DTC health brands, why is medical spend at all-time highs while avg lifespan has flatlined/slightly decreased?

analysis.summary: The Lanby's Tandice Urban discusses healthcare's customer service problem and potential solutions. The conversation also covers changing American perspectives on healthcare and the opportunity for DTC health brands. The episode was recorded live at the All-In Summit in Miami.

takeaways.text: Healthcare has a customer service problem
Medical spend is at all-time highs
Average lifespan has flatlined or decreased
Changing American perspectives on healthcare is key
Solving customer service issues can improve healthcare
Healthcare brands need to focus on customer experience
Technology can help improve healthcare customer service

sentiment.notes: The conversation is focused on solving problems and improving healthcare, indicating an optimistic tone. The discussion on opportunities for DTC health brands also contributes to the positive sentiment.

notable_moments.description: Tandice Urban introduces the topic of healthcare's customer service problem
Bestie Q&A session starts, discussing various healthcare-related topics
